name: Corben Leo
why_notable: Author of gau (GetAllURLs) — a Go tool that aggregates historical URLs from four sources in a single pass: Wayback Machine (CDX API), Common Crawl, AlienVault OTX, and URLScan.io. The key insight over waybackurls (which only queries Wayback) is that each source captures different URL sets: OTX sees URLs from malware and phishing feeds, URLScan sees anything submitted for security scanning, Common Crawl has petabyte-scale web crawl coverage. Combining all four dramatically increases the historical URL surface revealed before active scanning even begins.
